languages.text: "Осада дворца Вольного Торговца — заметное событие. Почему я ничего не слышал{mf||а} о нем?"
"The siege of a Rogue Trader's palace would be a notable event. Why have I heard nothing of it?"
languages.original_text: "Осада дворца Вольного Торговца — заметное событие. Почему я ничего не слышал{mf||а} о нем?"

traits.locale_text: "The siege of a Rogue Trader's palace is a notable event. Why have I heard nothing of it?"

languages.text: "Die Belagerung des Palastes eines Freihändlers wäre ein bemerkenswertes Ereignis. Warum habe ich nichts davon gehört?"
languages.original_text: "The siege of a Rogue Trader's palace would be a notable event. Why have I heard nothing of it?"

traits.locale_text: "Die Belagerung des Palastes eines Freihändlers wäre ein bemerkenswertes Ereignis. Warum habe ich nichts davon gehört?"

languages.text: « Le siège du palais d'un libre-marchand passerait difficilement inaperçu. Pourquoi n'en ai-je jamais entendu parler ? »
languages.original_text: "The siege of a Rogue Trader's palace would be a notable event. Why have I heard nothing of it?"

traits.locale_text: « Le siège du palais d'un libre-marchand passerait difficilement inaperçu. Pourquoi n'en ai-je jamais entendu parler ? »

languages.text: «El asedio del palacio de un Comerciante Independiente sería todo un acontecimiento. ¿Cómo es que no sabía nada al respecto?».
languages.original_text: "The siege of a Rogue Trader's palace would be a notable event. Why have I heard nothing of it?"

traits.locale_text: «El asedio del palacio de un Comerciante Independiente sería todo un acontecimiento. ¿Cómo es que no sabía nada al respecto?».

languages.text: "Bir Hür Tacir'in sarayının kuşatılması önemli bir olaydır. Neden bu konuda hiçbir şey duymadım?"
languages.original_text: "The siege of a Rogue Trader's palace would be a notable event. Why have I heard nothing of it?"

traits.locale_text: "Bir Hür Tacir'in sarayının kuşatılması önemli bir olaydır. Neden bu konuda hiçbir şey duymadım?"

languages.text: “围攻一位行商浪人的宫殿，这事非同小可。为什么我从未听说过？”
languages.original_text: "The siege of a Rogue Trader's palace would be a notable event. Why have I heard nothing of it?"

traits.locale_text: “围攻一位行商浪人的宫殿，这事非同小可。为什么我从未听说过？”

languages.text: 「ならず者トレーダーの宮殿の包囲は、注目すべき出来事でしょう。なぜそれを聞いたことがないのですか？」
languages.original_text: "The siege of a Rogue Trader's palace would be a notable event. Why have I heard nothing of it?"

traits.locale_text: 「ならず者トレーダーの宮殿の包囲は、注目すべき出来事でしょう。なぜそれを聞いたことがないのですか？」
